mysteries.title: Annuntiátio
mysteries.body: The Archangel Gabriel announces to the Virgin Mary that she will conceive and bear the Son of God. She answers: 'Behold the handmaid of the Lord.'

mysteries.title: Visitátio
mysteries.body: Mary visits her cousin Elizabeth, who greets her: 'Blessed art thou among women.' Mary responds with the Magnificat.

mysteries.title: Natívitas
mysteries.body: Jesus is born in a stable in Bethlehem. Shepherds come to adore Him; angels sing 'Gloria in excelsis Deo.'

mysteries.title: Præsentátio
mysteries.body: Mary and Joseph present the infant Jesus in the Temple. Simeon recognizes Him as the Messiah and prophesies the sword that will pierce Mary's heart.

mysteries.title: Invéntio in Templo
mysteries.body: After three days of anxious searching, Mary and Joseph find the twelve-year-old Jesus in the Temple, teaching the doctors.

mysteries.title: Agonía in Horto
mysteries.body: Jesus falls prostrate in prayer in the Garden of Gethsemane, knowing the full weight of the suffering that awaits Him. His sweat becomes as drops of blood falling to the ground.

mysteries.title: Flagellátio
mysteries.body: Jesus is bound to a pillar and scourged by the Roman soldiers. His innocent flesh is torn for our sins of the flesh.

mysteries.title: Coronátio Spinis
mysteries.body: A crown of thorns is pressed upon the head of Jesus, and the soldiers mock Him as King of the Jews. He bears humiliation in silence.

mysteries.title: Bajulátio Crucis
mysteries.body: Jesus carries His Cross along the road to Calvary, falling beneath its weight, meeting His Blessed Mother along the way.

mysteries.title: Crucifíxio
mysteries.body: Jesus is nailed to the Cross and dies after three hours of agony. His last words: 'Father, into Thy hands I commend My spirit.'

mysteries.title: Resurréctio
mysteries.body: On the third day, Jesus rises from the dead, victorious over sin and death. The women at the tomb are greeted by an angel: 'He is not here, He is risen.'

mysteries.title: Ascénsio
mysteries.body: Forty days after His Resurrection, Jesus ascends into Heaven in the sight of His Apostles, promising to send the Holy Spirit.

mysteries.title: Descénsus Spíritus Sancti
mysteries.eng: The Descent of the Holy Spirit
mysteries.body: On Pentecost, the Holy Spirit descends upon the Apostles in the form of tongues of fire. The Church is born.

mysteries.title: Assúmptio
mysteries.body: The Blessed Virgin Mary, at the end of her earthly life, is assumed body and soul into Heaven.

mysteries.title: Coronátio
mysteries.body: Mary is crowned Queen of Heaven and earth by her Divine Son, reigning in glory as intercessor for all mankind.
